# aimy-bio-open-biorhythms

> Open reference implementation and specification of dr. Jerzy Sikora's biorhythm
> method — the verified engine behind https://aimy.bio. A privacy-first, free
> tribute. Four states: + high, − low, X critical, 0 zero. Cycles: physical 23,
> emotional 28, intellectual 33 days. Day count uses a birth-time correction (AM −1,
> PM −2, unknown −1). Source code: MIT. Documentation and data: CC BY 4.0
> (attribution required).

## Method specification
- [Biorhythm method specification (EN)](docs/method.md): discrete-phase method (symbols +, -, X, 0), phase tables for the 23/28/33-day cycles, day-count with birth-time correction, and BioMatch partner compatibility.
- [Specyfikacja metody (PL)](docs/pl/method.md)

## Philosophy and tribute
- [Why open, and a tribute to dr. Jerzy Sikora (EN)](docs/philosophy.md)
- [Filozofia i hołd (PL)](docs/pl/philosophy.md)

## Reference implementation
- [engine.js](src/engine.js): the exact math, zero dependencies.
- [Golden vectors — data dictionary](data/README.md): 663 Sikora + 86 BioMatch vectors proving correctness (`npm test`).

## Live application
- https://aimy.bio — the free, privacy-first biorhythm app built on this engine.
